pr.title: Record: 11L XSA + EMA + TTT + Partial RoPE + LN Scale — val_bpb=1.1401

output.summary: 11-layer transformer pairs exclusive self-attn on top layers with EMA+TTT, U-Net skips, partial RoPE/LN scaling, SmearGate+BigramHash, and late int6 QAT.
techniques: Exclusive self-attention plus EMA weight averaging with TTT on validation
U-Net-style skips with Partial RoPE and layer-scaled LN for stabilized depth
SmearGate/BigramHash embeddings and late absmax int6 QAT rollout
